LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RBCC INC. & TRUST DBA ZEITGEIST'S (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS RBCC INC & TRUST OF HILDEGARD GRAHLMANN DBA ZEITGEIST) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND, FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. ALL BUT THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS BASED ON A "DIRECT VICTIM" THEORY IS NOT A COGNIZABLE CLAIM IN THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS CASE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RBCC INC.DBA ZEITGEIST'S (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS RBCC INC & TRUST OF HILDEGARD GRAHLMANN DBA ZEITGEIST) MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF ADEQUATELY ALLEGED A REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BAEAK HASHEMI, TEL. NO. (949) 283-6768 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. MONA FOTOOHI OF LEWIS, BRISBOIS LLP, TEL. NO. 438-5933 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RBCC INC. & TRUST dba ZEITGEIST'S (erroneously sued as RBCC INC & TRUST OF HILDEGARD GRAHLMANN dba ZEITGEIST) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled as to the first, second, fourth and fifth causes of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the third causes of action. All but the third cause of action are adequately pled. The third cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress based on a "direct victim" theory is not a cognizable claim in the circumstances of this case. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BAEAK HASHEMI, TEL. NO. (949) 283-6768 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. MONA FOTOOHI OF LEWIS, BRISBOIS LLP, TEL. NO. 438-5933 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RBCC INC.dba ZEITGEIST'S (erroneously sued as RBCC INC & TRUST OF HILDEGARD GRAHLMANN dba ZEITGEIST) MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Denied. Plaintiff adequately alleged a request for punitive damages. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)
